summary.text: From 0-6s, underwater footage displays a swimming pool featuring a light blue floor with black lane lines and dark circular markers aligned horizontally on the far wall. Swimmers equipped with fins are visible near the surface on the left and right sides, kicking their legs and treading water; the swimmer on the right shifts leg position downward while bubbles float upward toward the rippling surface. Lane lines and targets remain static. At 6s, the video cuts abruptly to an outdoor scene looking upward at a bright blue sky filled with scattered white clouds. In the bottom left corner, the dark angular edge of a roof structure with metal supports appears. From 6-12s, the camera remains fixed on the sky while the cloud formations drift slightly against the blue background, maintaining the outdoor perspective established after the underwater segment ends.

[12-16] The camera cuts from the sky to surface-level footage of snorkelers treading water near palm trees and a red goal frame. A figure with a white cap and yellow snorkel is prominent. The view dips into turbulent water showing fins, then resurfaces near a grey-roofed structure.
[16-20] Submerging, the camera shows the pool floor with black lane lines and circular wall targets. Swimmers kick near the surface, and a figure swims horizontally on the right.
[20-24] A close-up underwater shot features a swimmer's face with a black mask, snorkel, and blue/white/orange striped cap amidst bubbles.
[24-26] The perspective widens underwater, showing a swimmer with dark fins swimming away in the distance.

[26-32] A central swimmer dives vertically downwards with fins pointed upward, eventually leveling out near the pool floor to swim horizontally along a black lane line. Surrounding individuals wearing fins and masks propel themselves horizontally near the surface and mid-depth on the left and right, set against dark circular targets on the far wall. [32-36] The scene cuts to a close-up where a swimmer in a black swimsuit and long fins grapples with an opponent wearing a blue cap marked "3" and a patterned swimsuit, who holds a red ball tightly. A third swimmer in black shorts and a blue cap swims overhead. [36-38] Returning to a wide underwater perspective, multiple swimmers with fins are visible; individuals on the periphery swim near the surface while a cluster of players engages in close contact near the tiled floor in the lower right.

[38-40] Wide underwater footage displays swimmers with fins distributed across the pool, with individuals on the left swimming horizontally near the surface and a group maneuvering mid-water on the right, including one with yellow fins near the tiled floor. [40-44] The camera follows a swimmer in a patterned blue, white, and black swimsuit near the surface clutching a red ball, as another swimmer in a black swimsuit and fins enters from the right reaching for the ball. [44-46] The black-suited swimmer grapples with the ball carrier while a swimmer in blue trunks is inverted above and another with dark fins maneuvers below. [46-48] The camera angles upward toward the rippling surface, showing legs with dark blue fins and the pool edge. [48-52] Swimmers cluster near the floor where black lane lines converge; a swimmer in a black swimsuit and white cap engages a central group including a blue-capped swimmer, creating bubbles as they struggle, ending with a hand holding the red ball visible bottom left and a large black fin hanging from the surface.

[52-58] A swimmer wearing a white cap with black markings and a snorkel holds a red ball while swimming along black lane lines. Another swimmer in a blue cap with the number 3 approaches, extending an arm toward the ball carrier. [58-62] The swimmer in the white cap and patterned trunks places the red ball into a circular goal hoop with black and white markings resting on the tiled pool floor. The scene cuts to a swimmer in a blue cap and goggles swimming vertically near the pool wall. [62-68] A wide underwater view from the pool floor shows a central drain and black lane lines. Multiple swimmers equipped with fins and masks are visible near the surface, with some diving downwards. A swimmer in dark trunks and blue fins swims horizontally, while others descend headfirst toward the tiled bottom.

Swimmers equipped with fins are visible near the surface on the left and right sides, kicking their legs and treading water; the swimmer on the right shifts leg position downward while bubbles float upward toward the rippling surface. Lane lines and targets remain static. At 6s, the video cuts abruptly to an outdoor scene looking upward at a bright blue sky filled with scattered white clouds. In the bottom left corner, the dark angular edge of a roof structure with metal supports appears. From 6-12s, the camera remains fixed on the sky while the cloud formations drift slightly against the blue background, maintaining the outdoor perspective established after the underwater segment ends. [12-16] The camera cuts from the sky to surface-level footage of snorkelers treading water near palm trees and a red goal frame. A figure with a white cap and yellow snorkel is prominent. The view dips into turbulent water showing fins, then resurfaces near a grey-roofed structure. [16-20] Submerging, the camera shows the pool floor with black lane lines and circular

[186-194] A swimmer (described initially in blue trunks, then in black and white patterned shorts) levels out and propels forward near the pool floor, clutching a red ball against their torso and extending a right arm. Behind and above, an individual wearing long black fins maintains pursuit, swimming parallel just above the black lane lines. Both figures glide horizontally over the light blue tiled surface as they traverse the pool, with the carrier holding the ball tight to their chest.

From 194-198s, a swimmer in blue trunks propels forward near the pool floor along the black lane line, clutching an object, while an individual with long black fins follows closely above. From 198-200s, the swimmer in blue trunks with 'budgy smuggler' text interacts with a swimmer in white trunks near the lane lines. The scene transitions to a swimmer in a black swimsuit positioned vertically near the white metal goal structure. From 200-202s, the view shifts to the surface, featuring a swimmer in a blue, black, and white patterned swimsuit with a back cutout swimming away amidst turbulent water and bubbles, while another swimmer's legs with black fins kick to the left.

[202-204] Underwater, a swimmer in a blue, black, and white patterned swimsuit extends an arm on the right while a swimmer in a black swimsuit propels horizontally with fins in the background left. Below, an individual in black shorts and fins swims near the pool floor. [204-206] The camera breaches the surface, transitioning to an outdoor scene with green grass, palm trees, and a bright sky where yellow barriers line the side. [206-208] Above water, the pool area shows grass, trees, and a fence. Yellow barriers line the edge, where a swimmer in a blue cap is visible. [208-210] The view returns underwater near the pool wall. On the right, the individual in the patterned swimsuit moves through the water. To the left, two figures in dark swimwear and fins hover vertically near the wall above black lane lines on the tiled floor.

From 210-212s, two swimmers in dark swimwear hover vertically near the left pool wall while a swimmer in a blue, black, and white patterned swimsuit moves near the surface on the right. Below, an individual in dark shorts swims forward as the camera tilts up to the turbulent surface. At 212s, the scene cuts to a static underwater view of the empty pool floor featuring light blue tiles, black lane lines, and a central metal drain with rising bubble streams. This static shot persists until 218s, when white text reading "UNSW Underwater Rugby (Sydney, Australia)" appears at the bottom, superimposed over larger, fainter text.

To the right, another individual wearing a blue cap and yellow fins swims nearby, while legs equipped with blue fins appear in the lower left corner amidst the clear blue water.

A close-up underwater shot reveals a red ball resting inside a white cage-like goal structure near the pool wall. A swimmer wearing blue trunks with white text reading 'buggy smugger' maneuvers upside down above the goal, while other swimmers' limbs and black fins are visible interacting nearby.

The view transitions above water, displaying a poolside area with a large metal-roofed pavilion and palm trees behind a black fence. A swimmer wearing a blue cap with a white number 3 floats near the surface alongside yellow and red floating barriers.
